name: BlASSter
description: A Bandit E-tech assault rifle that fires elemental energy bolts for the cost of two rounds per shot. It can roll very large magazines and keeps the usual Bandit feel for recoil and reloads, but slow projectiles, weak critical hits, and poor ammo efficiency make it hard to justify for long.
notes: It is a standard world drop from suitable loot sources. A version tied to Medical Mystery: X-Com-municate can bug out and spawn without typical E-tech parts such as the capacitor, sight, or accessory.
